$comment: Canonical, cross-platform achievement + leaderboard taxonomy for Tidbits Trivia. ONE source of truth consumed by both the App Store Connect API script (Apple Game Center) and the Google Play Games Services Publishing API script (see docs/GAMECENTER-ACHIEVEMENTS-PLAYBOOK.md). Slugs are shared so the same conceptual achievement exists on both platforms. Learning-oriented: streaks, category mastery, breadth across domains, calibration, comeback — not raw volume. Creating these via API is OWNER-BLOCKED (needs the ASC API key + Game Center enabled on the app; and a Play Games Services project + service account). The app already tracks every unlock condition locally (RecordsStore / Store.progress()).

leaderboards.name: Daily Streak
leaderboards.detail: Longest consecutive days of the Daily Tidbit

leaderboards.name: Survival Streak
leaderboards.detail: Most questions in one Survival run

achievements.name: Domain Master
achievements.detail: Master any one domain (15+ right at 60%+).

achievements.name: Well-Rounded
achievements.detail: Play a question in every one of the seven domains.

achievements.name: Sure Thing
achievements.detail: Land a max-confidence Stake bet at 80%+ hit-rate over 10+ tries.

achievements.name: Comeback
achievements.detail: Win a Survival run of 15+ after ending a previous run at 3 or fewer.

achievements.name: Master of Ceremonies
achievements.detail: Host a Trivia Night that someone joins.
